session.assistant:
## All PR Comments Addressed
**Total comments:** 3 review threads **Pre-existing (auto-resolved):** 1 **Actionable (code changes):** 2 **Commits:** 1 (`868ebf514`)
**Changes made to `docs/learned/planning/metadata-update-patterns.md`:** - Corrected `get_plan()`/`PlanNotFound` → `get_managed_pr()`/`PrNotFound` in the `write_dispatch_metadata()` section - Fixed function name `resolve_plan_id_for_branch()` → `resolve_pr_number_for_branch()` - Removed non-existent "Set-Based Field Validation" section; replaced with accurate "Two-Guard LBYL Pattern" description - Updated tripwire warning: clarified that silent skip has no warning printed
All review threads resolved. Branch pushed. PR description updated.
